title: MoreBeeInfo
description: Client-side Mod that adds the number of bees and the level of honey in the bee nest and the hive
body: ![](https://i.imgur.com/xMwP5E5.png) **This mod will no longer be updated to higher versions as of 1.21.2 because it is already added natively in the game.** **~Features~** -------------- Adds the number of bees and the honey level in the bee nest and hive, making it easier for you to search for bees in your world as you will know how many bees are in the hive you find.It is only necessary at the client. ![](https://i.imgur.com/hIazifM.png)![](https://i.imgur.com/QlI8W1Q.png) Some translations were generated automatically! [](https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=127)
